title: LWV / USA TODAY Network Tennessee Forum — Lipscomb University
description: Statewide candidate forum covering Republican and Democratic governor candidates, plus congressional candidates in TN-5, TN-6, and TN-7. One of six forums planned statewide by this partnership. Broadcast live on Tennessean.com, KnoxNews.com, and CommercialAppeal.com. Moderated by Cameron Smith and Michelle Steele.
meta: Nashville · George Shinn Event Center, Lipscomb University · 7:00 PM CDT

title: Knox County Republican Primary
description: Larsen Jay, Betsy Henderson, and Kim Frazier compete for the GOP mayoral nomination. Winner faces Democrat Beau Hawk in the August 6 general. Early voting ran April 15–30.
meta: Knox County · all polling places · Election Day

title: GOP Gubernatorial Primary Debate
description: Republican primary candidates Marsha Blackburn, John Rose, and Monty Fritts. Date and host TBD; pre-primary debate expected late June or early July.

title: Democratic Gubernatorial Forum
description: Jerri Green and Dr. Carnita Atwater face questions ahead of the August primary. Anticipated Memphis-area host.

title: U.S. Senate Candidate Forum
description: Democratic primary candidates including Marquita Bradshaw and Maria Brewer. Expected LWV Tennessee co-host.

title: General Election Gubernatorial Debate
description: The major-party gubernatorial nominees face off ahead of November. Likely Vanderbilt or MTSU host.

title: LWV Tennessee Statewide Forum Series
description: League of Women Voters chapters host candidate forums across the state from July through October. Check chapter pages for dates.
